_meta._DRAFT: Auto-generated. Labels/types/sections inferred; REVIEW priorities, required flags, and cross-field logic (insurer letter refs, optional blocks, radio groups) by hand.

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g. agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer full name
fields.help: The full name of the producer/agency

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g. agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Producer customer identifier
fields.help: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g. agency or brokerage)

fields.label: Form completion date
fields.help: The date on which the form is completed

fields.label: Policy policy number identifier
fields.help: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols. If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number

fields.label: Policy effective date
fields.help: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence

fields.label: Insurer full name
fields.help: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name

fields.label: Insurer naiccode
fields.help: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the NAIC

fields.label: Named insured full name
fields.help: The named insured(s) as it/they will appear on the policy declarations page

fields.label: Business information business type repair shop indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the nature of business is a repair shop

fields.label: Business information business type mobile home trailer dealer indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the nature of business is a mobile home trailer dealer

fields.label: Business information business type service station indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the nature of business is a service station

fields.label: Business information business type commercial trailer dealer indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the nature of business is a commercial trailer dealer

fields.label: Business information business type storage garage public parking indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the nature of business is a storage, garage or public parking facility

fields.label: Business information business type other indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the nature of business is other than those listed

fields.label: Business information business type other description
fields.help: The description of the nature/type of business

fields.label: Business information franchised indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the operations are franchised

fields.label: Business information non franchised indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the operations are not franchised

fields.label: Business information annual gross receipts amount
fields.help: The total annual gross sales or receipts

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type car indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the business deals with cars

fields.label: Garage and dealers inventory car percent
fields.help: The percentage of total inventory kept in cars

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type truck tractor indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the business deals with truck-tractors

fields.label: Garage and dealers inventory truck tractor percent
fields.help: The percentage of total inventory kept in truck-tractors

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type motorcycle indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the business deals with motorcycles

fields.label: Garage and dealers inventory motorcycle percent
fields.help: The percentage of total inventory kept in motorcycles

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type recreational vehicle indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the business deals with recreational vehicles

fields.label: Garage and dealers inventory recreational vehicle percent
fields.help: The percentage of total inventory kept in recreational vehicles

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type snowmobile indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the business deals with snowmobiles

fields.label: Garage and dealers inventory snowmobile percent
fields.help: The percentage of total inventory kept in snowmobiles

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type other indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the business deals with vehicles other than those listed

fields.label: Garage and dealers vehicle type other description
fields.help: The description of the types of vehicles dealt with in the business

fields.label: Garage and dealers inventory other percent
fields.help: The percentage of total inventory kept in vehicles other than those listed

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type building percent
fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored within a building

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type standard open lot percent
fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored in a standard open lot.  The lot is enclosed by walls or fences at least six feet in height, with openings securely locked when unattended

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type non standard open lot percent
fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored in a non-standard open lot.  The lot is either an open lot or an unroofed space and the building is not securely enclosed or locked when unattended

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type other description
fields.help: The description of the type of facility

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type other storage area percent
fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored in an area other than those listed

fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored within a building

fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored in a standard open lot.  The lot is enclosed by walls or fences at least six feet in height, with openings securely locked when unattended

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type non standard open lot percent
fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored in a non-standard open lot.  The lot is either an open lot or an unroofed space and the building is not securely enclosed or locked when unattended

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type other storage area percent

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type non standard open lot percent

fields.label: Garage and dealers facility type other storage area percent
fields.help: The percentage of inventory stored in an area other than those listed

fields.label: Garage and dealers class one employees regular operator count
fields.help: The number of class I (employees) regular operators - Proprietors, partners and officers active in the garage operation, salespersons, general managers, service managers; any employee  whose principal duty involves the operation of covered autos or who is furnished a covered auto

fields.label: Garage and dealers class one employees other operator count
fields.help: The number of class I (employees) operators other than regular operators

fields.label: Garage and dealers class two non employees under age twenty five count
fields.help: The number of class II (non-employees) operators under the age of 25 - Any of the following persons who are regularly furnished with a covered auto: inactive-proprietors, partners or officers and their relatives and the relatives of any person described in class I

fields.label: Garage and dealers class two non employees other operator count
fields.help: The number of class II (non-employees) operators other than those under the age of 25

fields.label: Commercial structure estimated annual remuneration amount
fields.help: The estimated annual payroll for the location. Payroll means money or substitutes for money, such as the value of meals or lodging if provided. Accurate payroll estimates help avoid additional premium requirements being discovered during an audit. Do not include overtime premium

fields.help: The total number of employee in this location

fields.label: Garage and dealers coverage comprehensive option new indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates new vehicles are to be covered by comprehensive coverage

fields.label: Garage and dealers coverage comprehensive option used indicator
fields.help: check the box (if applicable): Indicates used vehicles are to be covered by comprehensive coverage

fields.label: Garage and dealers coverage comprehensive option owned indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the dealers interest in covered autos owned by the dealer are to be covered by comprehensive coverage

fields.label: Garage and dealers coverage comprehensive option financed indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the dealers interest only in financed covered autos are to be covered by comprehensive coverage

fields.label: Garage and dealers coverage comprehensive option owned and financed indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the dealers and financed interests in covered autos are to be covered by comprehensive coverage

fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the dealers interest in covered autos owned by the dealer are to be covered by specified perils coverage

sections.label: Garage and dealers line of business

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business attachment commercial auto driver information schedule indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that additional drivers appear on the attached ACORD 163 Commercial Auto Driver Information Schedule

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kabcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant rent, lease or loan vehicles to others?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kaccode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant pick-up or deliver customer's cars?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kadcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does pick-up or delivery exceed 50 miles?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kaecode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Is tire recapping or retreading performed?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kafcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant own or sponsor a car for racing?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kagcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant handle butane, propane or other gases?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kahcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Are vehicles furnished for group or organizations?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kaicode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant perform spray painting or welding?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kajcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant drive-away or haul-away vehicles from factory distributing point or other dealers?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kakcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant dismantle autos or have salvage operation?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kalcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant use tow trucks?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kamcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Do employees regularly use own autos on company business?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kancode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant park customer's vehicles on public streets or off premises?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kaocode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Is a charge made for parking?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kapcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Any private protection systems? (fences, dogs, alarms, guards)

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kaqcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Is applicant involved in any "non garage" operations? (mini marts, liquor stores, etc)

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question karcode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Does applicant perform road emergency services?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business question kascode
fields.help: Enter Y for a Yes response. Input N for No response. Indicates the response to the question, Any drivers with convictions for moving traffic violations?

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business attachment additional interest indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that further additional interests appear on the attached ACORD 45

fields.label: Garage and dealers line of business remark text
fields.help: The remarks associated with the Garage and Dealers line of business.  Enter any endorsements that apply. Be sure to include the form numbers and the required information for attaching the endorsement.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached  if more space is required

fields.label: Driver producer identifier
fields.help: The number assigned to the driver by the producer

fields.label: Driver given name
fields.help: The driver's first name (given name)

fields.label: Driver other given name initial
fields.help: The driver's middle name or initial (other given name)

fields.label: Driver surname
fields.help: The driver's last name (surname)

fields.label: Driver mailing address city name
fields.help: The city of the driver

fields.label: Driver mailing address state or province code
fields.help: The state or province of the driver

fields.label: Driver mailing address postal code
fields.help: The postal code of the driver

fields.label: Driver gender code
fields.help: The gender of the driver

fields.label: Driver marital status code
fields.help: The marital status of the driver. Examples are: S - Single; M - Married; D - Divorced; P - Separated; W - Widowed, C - Domestic Partner (unmarried), V - Civil Union/Registered Domestic Partner, F- Fiancé/Fiancée, U - Unknown, O - Other

fields.label: Driver birth date
fields.help: The birth date of the driver

fields.label: Driver experience year count
fields.help: The number of years of driving experience for the driver

fields.label: Driver licensed year
fields.help: The original year in which a driver's license was issued to this driver

fields.label: Driver license number identifier
fields.help: The driver's license number

fields.label: Driver tax identifier
fields.help: The tax identifier (social security number) of the driver

fields.label: Driver licensed state or province code
fields.help: The state in which the driver is licensed

fields.label: Driver hired date
fields.help: The date the driver was hired

fields.label: Driver vehicle producer identifier
fields.help: The producer assigned vehicle number that this driver primarily uses

fields.label: Driver vehicle use percent
fields.help: Indicates the percentage of driving done by this driver in the primary vehicle that this driver uses

fields.help: The number of years of driving experience for the driver

fields.label: Driver vehicle use percent
fields.help: Indicates the percentage of driving done by this driver in the primary vehicle that this driver uses

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, list the frequency, who receives the vehicles and if this is part of the normal business operations.  Indicate if insurance is provided

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, indicate how many cars per day, and how the employee commutes to the location

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, indicate the radius of this operation if it exceeds 50 miles, and how often

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, list the percentage of gross sales this operation represents.  Indicate if the applicant sends out for retreads, or if the applicant performs the operation

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, provide a description of the car.  Indicate how frequently the car is raced, who drives the car and how the car is transported

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, state what type of storage facilities are used, what gases are involved and if they are for sale to the general public

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, identify the group (school, hospital, church, or civic organization) to which the vehicle is loaned.  Indicate if there is a charge

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, indicate how frequently this type of operation is performed, and if the applicant has approved booths or ventilated spray areas.  Describe the type of welding or painting job handled and where in the building each job is located

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, describe circumstances causing drive-aways.  Indicate if this is a regular operation, how many cars are involved, and give the radius of operation

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, describe this type of operation completely.  If there is a salvage operation on premises, so indicate

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, indicate how many trucks are owned or used by the applicant and describe towing operations.  These trucks may be listed on ACORD 129, Vehicle Schedule and attached to the Garage Section

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, list who, what vehicle and for what operations

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, describe any type of off-premises parking of vehicles

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, indicate how much is charged, how many attendants are on duty, and the hours of operation.  Indicate if employees drive vehicles or if customers self-park

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, describe all such systems in detail

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, if a retail operation, mini-mart, liquor store, or other operation is run on the premises, list the operation and annual gross sales from this portion of the business.  Indicate if there is any insurance for this operation

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, indicate if the applicant is on call for any highway or other emergencies, and if towing operations are available around the clock

fields.label: Underwriting question remark text
fields.help: An explanation of a response to a general information or underwriting question.  Normally, "Yes" responses require an explanation. As used here, give driver name and number, date, type and place for each conviction.  Enter the number of years reviewed, in accordance with the company's and state's requirements.  In Kansas, certain traffic violations are not required to be reported to insurers
